title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zebronics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zebronics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zebronics! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zebronics:
Zebronics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zebronics!
